original_abstract:
The discussion method is an instructional approach that centers on scientific exchange, allowing students to collaborate in expressing opinions, drawing conclusions, and formulating alternative solutions to complex problems. In the context of Islamic Religious Education (PAI), this method aims to deepen students' understanding of their relationships with the Divine, fellow humans, and the environment. This research explores the correlation between the implementation of the discussion method (Variable X) and student learning outcomes (Variable Y) at MAN 1 Tangerang.

Utilizing a quantitative correlational design, the study focused on a target population of 742 students, specifically narrowing the scope to 117 students in Grade XI. A sample of 38 students was selected using non-probability quota sampling. Data analysis was conducted via Product Moment Correlation. The statistical results yielded a calculated r-value of 0.34, which exceeded the critical r-table value of 0.32 at a 5% significance level. Consequently, the null hypothesis—which posited no significant influence—was rejected. The findings confirm that the discussion method has a significant positive impact on student learning outcomes within the PAI curriculum, particularly regarding the study of commendable and despicable morals. The study suggests that active scientific dialogue not only improves academic performance but also fosters critical thinking and mutual respect among students.
humanized_abstract:
Methode diskusi adalah suatu pendekatan pembelajaran yang didasari pada prinsip komunikasi ilmiah sehingga para siswa dibuat untuk saling berkomunikasi untuk mengeksplisitkan pendapat, ketuntunan, dan alternatif solusi terhadap suatu masalah yang tergolong kompleks. Dalam Pendidikan Agama Islam (PAI), para siswa dipertanggungjawabkan untuk mengetahui bagaimana membangun hubungan dirinya dengan Allah, dengan manusia dan lingkungan sekitar. Penelitian ini memiliki tujuan untuk mengetahui korelasi antara Variabel X (Methode Diskusi) dan Variabel Y (hasil belajar siswa) pada MAN 1 Tangerang.

This study employed quantitative correlational research design. The target population for this study was 742 students at one of the schools in Purbalingga. The researcher chose 117 samples of Grade XI students. From the total samples chosen, the researcher selected 38 students using non-probability quota sampling. The Product Moment Correlation was used to analyze the data. The statistical results revealed that the calculated r-value was 0.34 which was greater than the critical r-table value (0.32) at 5% significance level. Thus, the null hypothesis was rejected. It can be concluded that discussion method has a positive significant effect on student learning outcomes in PAI subject especially in understanding the commendable and despicable morals. Thus, scientific dialogue as part of dialogical learning approach can increase student achievement, sharpen student's critical minds and increase mutual respect among students.
